---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

What user pain or limitation are you hitting? Be specific — the more concrete, the easier it is to scope a solution.

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? Sketch the API, UI flow, or behavior change. Mockups or wireframes are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What other options did you weigh? What ruled them out?

## Acceptance criteria

How will we know this feature is done? List the observable behaviors that must be true.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

References, related issues, performance numbers, prior art in other platforms, etc.
